name: Lagos-Ibadan Expressway Expansion
description: A major federal road rehabilitation and expansion project covering 127km of the Lagos-Ibadan expressway, one of Nigeria's busiest arterial roads.

ai_analysis.label: Construction activity detected
ai_analysis.detail: Heavy machinery and earthworks visible across 4 zones. Road surface incomplete on northern stretch.

name: Kano Rural Hospital Facility
description: A primary healthcare centre commissioned to serve 80,000 rural residents in Kano State. Construction halted after contractor abandonment.

ai_analysis.label: No recent construction activity
ai_analysis.detail: Site shows no movement for over 180 days. Partial roofing structure detected but no workers or machinery visible.

whatsapp_reports.summary: No site activity seen in 6 months. Community residents report abandoned structure.

name: Port Harcourt Primary School Renovation
description: Full renovation of Rumuola Model Primary School including new classrooms, sanitation blocks, and solar-powered lighting. Project delivered on time.

ai_analysis.label: Completed structure confirmed
ai_analysis.detail: Roofing, walls, and surrounding compound fully visible. Pupils present in satellite imagery. No discrepancy detected.

whatsapp_reports.summary: School is fully operational. Community confirms pupils are attending classes.
